case_title: PATRICIA ELIZA TRATEBAS VS. FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
